raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Taws Zetsch/ un taws
Darritschanae irr tew Schahs Lee-
tas darrijschas/ tchi irr tawa
Blehdiba/ kas tik rubkta irr/ ka
ta lihds patt Sirdi sneedsahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ak! mannas Eekfchas/
mannas Eekfchas/ manni spee-
schahs ka Behrnu-Sahpes zaur
mannu Sirdi/ manna Sirds lezz
eekich mannim/ es ne warru
kluffu zeest/ jo manna Dwehfele
dsird Basunes Skannu / un
Kaxxa Trohktui.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Weena Satreekschana
pehz ohtras tohp faukta .Jo wiffa
Semme irr pohsita / peepefschi
irr mannas Teltis pohstitas/
mannas Gardines Azzumirkli.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Zik ilgi buhs man jelle to
Karrogu redseht? un to Basunes
Skannu dsirdeht?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Teefchain/ manni Laudis
irr trakki/ un ne pasihst manni/
tee irr gekktigi Behrni/ un ne-
saprattigi. Tee irr gann gudri
fauna darriht/ bet labba darriht
tee ne finna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es usluhkoju to Sem-
mi/ un rangi/ ta bija pohsta un
tukscha/ ir to Debbesi/ un win-
nai ne bija fawa Gatschiba.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es usluhkoju tohs Kal-
nus/ un rangi/ tee drebbeja/ un
wiffi Pakalni tribzeja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es lubkoju/ un rangi/ ne-
weens Zilweks bija/ un wiffi
Putni appaksch Debbes bij ais-
strehjuschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es lubkoju/ un rangi/
ta augliga Semme bija weena
Tuksnefe/ un wiffi winnas
Pilssfahti bija talansiti preeksch
ta KUNGA/ un preeksch ta
Karstuuma winna Bahrsibas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo ta fakka tas KUNgs:
Wiffa ta Semme buhs pohsta /
tomehr es to lihds Gallam ne
ispohstischu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht behdasees ta
Semme/ un ta Debbes ang-
schain buhs apnellejsi/ jo es ef-
imu runnajs/ un esinu to apneh-
inees / un tas man ne buhs
schebl/ un es ne atgreesischobs
no ta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiffi Pilssfahti behg no
to Jahtneeku un Strehlneeku
Skannas/ tee ees beesas Wee-
tas/ un tahps uhs Afuina-
Kalneem/ wiffi Pilssfahti taps
atstahti/ un neweens buhs/ kas
eekich teem dsihwohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ko tu tad darrifi tu Poh-
stita? jepschu tu apgehrbtees ar
Purpuri/ jepschu tu ar Selta
Glihtumu isgresnofees/ jepschu
tu fawas Azzis jankas darrifi?
tad tu tomehr welti isgresnofees.
Tee Drauguti apsineij tewi/ tee
meklehs tawu Dwehfeii.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo es dsirdu weenu Balkt-
ni ka tahdas Dsemidetajas/ wee-
nu Behdafbanu / ka weenas/
kas pirmas Behrnu-Sahpes
zeefch/ to Balktni tahs Zianas
Mettas/winnawaid/ un isplefsch
jawas Rohkas / Ak waj man
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
